name: Arthur's Camping Adventure
developer: Jordan Freeman Group, Marc Brown Studios, Wanderful Edutainment
publisher: ZOOM Platform Media, Marc Brown Studios, Wanderful Edutainment
short_description: Arthur and Mr. Ratburn's class are taking a field trip to Mount Rockslide to explore the wilderness. It should have been all fine and dandy, but Mr. Ratburn ends up twisting his ankle on arrival at the campsite. It's now up to Arthur and his friend Buster to get some help!
detailed_description:
Arthur's Camping Adventure (aka Arthur's Wilderness Rescue) is about Arthur and Mr. Ratburn's class taking a field trip to Mount Rockslide to explore the wilderness. It should have been all fine and dandy, but Mr. Ratburn ends up twisting his ankle on arrival at the campsite. It's now up to Arthur and his friend Buster to get some help, as you choose from three different ways of getting rescue to arrive.

By using the mouse, you navigate around the campgrounds to find items that you need, certain items will need to be collected like getting a bag of food by finding another item that can be used to retrieve it. Most of the time will be pointing and clicking for items and using some of them by taking them out of the backpack. There's even an extra challenge of photographing wildlife during the game session (this can vary, mammals one time and flowers the next).

  • Climb the mountain, explore nature, and learn about wildlife with Arthur and Mr. Ratburn.

  • Search for 40 fun natural surprises as you see nature up close.

  • Help Mr. Ratburn off the mountain by building 3 different rescue devices.

  • Keep a scrapbook of your adventure with printable mammals, birds, insects, and flowers.
